questions.question: Gen X knew his "Sweet Emotion," Millennials knew his "Cryin," but Gen Z knew him as a judge on American Idol in 2011 and 2012.
What form of entertainment was popularized by providing radio-style shows on demand?
"Closer," "Roses," and "Don't Let Me Down" are three of the hit songs sung by this group.
How did Steve Harvey mess up the Miss Universe pageant in 2015?
questions.answer: He announced the wrong winner. Yikes!

questions.question: What did it mean when someone called a person or situation "sus"?
